title: Toon's Mons [Cobblemon]
description: A collection of mons inspired by the Cthulhu Mythos and other Lovecraft works with some of my own little freaks thrown in every now and then.
body:
Elder Pokémon: Exceptionally strong Pokémon that surpass the normal strength of most legendaries. 

Nyarlic Zombies: Infected Pokémon tend to vary from their base counterparts in some way but can sometimes just be visual variants.

Secret Pokemon: Undiscovered Pokémon that don't appear in the Pokédex. These are often weak-to-middling trophy Pokémon meant to be discovered through experimentation and have hints in the gallery.


Find out more about the Eldar Isles [here!](https://www.tumblr.com/eldarisles) 
  
  
  A Cobblemon addon that adds mons mostly inspired by the Cthulhu Mythos, other Lovecraft works, and many other things I enjoy. Now with PokeDex support!!

  Pokemon information now in Gallery.
  
  A custom starter.json is present within the zip file. If you do not know how to use custom starters please ask someone in the Cobblemon Discord and not me, please and thank you.
  
  If you have issues related to the addon itself, you can ask me in the Toon's Mons help thread in the Cobblemon Discord or my own Discord.

  The pack might say it's outdated in the resource pack screen. Ignore this; it works on the latest version of Cobblemon.
